name: CADIZ INC
summary: Cadiz Inc. is a Southern California water solutions provider owning approximately 46,000 acres of land in the Mojave Desert with 2.5 million acre-feet of permitted water supply and 1 million acre-feet of groundwater storage capacity. The company operates the Mojave Groundwater Bank, 220 miles of pipeline infrastructure, 43 miles of pipeline right-of-way, agricultural land, and water filtration technology (acquired from ATEC Systems) that removes contaminants including arsenic, nitrates, and Chromium 6 from groundwater.
